http_error_patterns.meaning: resource not found or not visible

general_principles: Prefer clean, accessible layouts with consistent spacing and clear hierarchy.
Keep states explicit: loading, empty, success, validation_error, forbidden, not_found, server_error.
Use concise, human microcopy that explains next action and never blames the user.

html_structure_seed.app_shell: Header + content container + optional contextual sidebar.
html_structure_seed.form_page: Title block, helper text, grouped fields, primary CTA, secondary escape action.
html_structure_seed.list_page: Filter/sort row, result list or table, paging controls, empty/error blocks.
html_structure_seed.detail_page: Primary content panel, metadata strip, contextual actions, related activity section.
html_structure_seed.moderation_page: Decision context, action controls, reason capture, confirmation feedback.

sprints.name: Auth + Discovery
sprints.goal: Enable entry, authentication, and read-only feed navigation

success_ux: Persist session tokens per auth strategy
error_ux: Map 422 details to field-level helper text
acceptance_criteria: Submit disabled until required fields are non-empty
API errors display without page crash
Keyboard Enter submits form

success_ux: Route to /feed with gateway auth context
Display active scope/permissions summary chip row
acceptance_criteria: No plaintext api_key shown after submit
Error states are non-destructive to user input

success_ux: Show owner created confirmation with owner_id
acceptance_criteria: Password policy hint visible before typing
Conflict error uses dedicated design state

pages.purpose: Browse visible posts with cursor pagination
success_ux: Show Load more when paging.has_more = true
error_ux: Retry inline block on network/server error
Empty illustration + CTA to create post if no data
acceptance_criteria: Cursor pagination does not duplicate cards
Scope change resets cursor

sprints.name: Posts + Comments
sprints.goal: Enable content creation, detail, editing, and commenting

acceptance_criteria: Visibility options exactly match API allowed values
Use-key restriction handled with explicit copy

success_ux: Show action bar: Edit, Flag, Comments
acceptance_criteria: Handles deleted/hidden resources gracefully
Skeleton state while fetching

success_ux: Confirm save and return to detail page
acceptance_criteria: Unsaved changes guard modal
Server-side validation messages render under fields

pages.purpose: Submit policy flag for a post
success_ux: Success dialog and redirect back to post
acceptance_criteria: Form cannot submit empty reason code
Long threads remain performant
Empty thread state has clear primary CTA

success_ux: Return to thread with new comment highlighted
error_ux: 403-specific messages for post state, permission, or comments toggle
acceptance_criteria: All forbidden reasons map to human-readable copy

sprints.name: Console Content + Moderation
sprints.goal: Enable owner workflow for managing posts and moderation actions

success_ux: Table/grid of posts with quick actions
acceptance_criteria: Supports empty state and sortable columns

success_ux: Redirect to console post list/detail with confirmation
acceptance_criteria: Field constraints match server validation exactly

success_ux: Show resulting post state and moderation timestamp
acceptance_criteria: Dangerous action requires confirmation modal
Action options match API exactly

sprints.name: Keys + Invites + Placeholder Completion
sprints.goal: Operational tooling for delegation and lifecycle controls

pages.purpose: Issue author/use keys with policy constraints
success_ux: One-time reveal of api_key with copy/download pattern
Display delegation metadata (depth, envelope id, expires_at_utc)
error_ux: Policy violation messages for ttl, subset, hierarchy, owner mismatch
acceptance_criteria: Secrets are not re-rendered after navigation
Conditional required UI for use keys is enforced

success_ux: Display lifecycle transition success state and disable repeat action
error_ux: Invalid state or missing key message
acceptance_criteria: Revoke action requires explicit confirmation text

success_ux: Show empty state with roadmap copy
Prepare table layout for future keychain records
acceptance_criteria: Can gracefully handle empty list as default

pages.purpose: Create invite (current API emits generated invite receipt)
success_ux: Receipt view with invite_id and created timestamp
error_ux: Fallback error panel if create fails
acceptance_criteria: Supports future extension for invite metadata fields

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A calm, trustworthy sign-in screen that gets returning owners into CRE8 in seconds.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Use a centered single-column card with generous spacing, clear field labels, and a confident primary button. Keep the email visible after errors, clear the password on 401, and show inline validation helpers without shifting layout.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Soft neutral background, high-contrast form card, subtle shadow, and clear success/error banners.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A secure operator login that makes secret handling feel safe and intentional.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Present key ID and API key in a secure form with masked input by default and reveal toggle. Add a short security tip block, avoid exposing secrets after submit, and keep errors concise and non-alarming.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Monospace support for key fields, shield icon accents, and strong visual separation between key ID and secret.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A welcoming owner onboarding page that feels premium but straightforward.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Build a simple registration form with strength hints for password rules and a clear progression to login after success. Surface conflict errors as actionable guidance and keep friction low.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Progressive helper text, password strength meter, and success confirmation panel with next-step CTA.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A scannable activity feed that helps users discover updates quickly.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Use card-based post previews with clear hierarchy (title, author, timestamp, snippet) and cursor-driven load-more behavior. Include polished empty/loading/error states that preserve rhythm and context.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Responsive multi-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile, lightweight filters near top.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A focused post composer designed for fast publishing with guardrails.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Provide a distraction-light editor with title, body, visibility selector, and publish action. Keep validation immediate and friendly; surface permission failures with clear explanation and next action.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Sticky action bar, autosize textarea, and compact metadata controls.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: An immersive article view with clear primary content and secondary actions.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Prioritize readability with generous line length control, metadata row, and action cluster for share/flag/edit depending on role. Error states should feel intentional, not broken.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Article typography scale, subtle separators, and optional sidebar for contextual actions.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A safe editing workspace that communicates confidence and revision intent.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Preload existing content into an editor with obvious save state and optional change-reason input. Keep unsaved-change awareness visible and confirm successful updates without redirect confusion.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Diff-friendly spacing, persistent save controls, and soft warning treatment for unsaved edits.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A respectful reporting flow that is quick, clear, and non-confrontational.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Implement as a compact modal or panel with reason selection and concise policy context. Confirm submission immediately and prevent duplicate submissions while request is in flight.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Neutral warning palette, compact form controls, and clear confirmation state.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A readable conversation thread that keeps context and chronology obvious.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Display comments in chronological order with clear nesting/author cues where applicable. Keep thread loading and unavailable states visually consistent with post detail pages.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Avatar + metadata row per comment, comfortable vertical rhythm, subtle dividers.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A simple reply composer that encourages thoughtful participation.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Use an inline composer below the thread with character-friendly textarea behavior and clear submit affordance. Explain permission/toggle blocks with plain language instead of technical errors.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Composer dock with gentle emphasis, inline validation, and optimistic submit feedback.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: An operational posts dashboard for owners to monitor and manage content quickly.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Build a high-signal table/list with status chips, visibility tags, and quick row actions. Include robust empty/error states and sorting/filter controls tuned for admin workflows.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Dense but legible layout, sticky headers, and status color coding.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: An admin-grade composer with publishing controls and policy-safe defaults.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Mirror gateway create UX but with admin context cues and optional advanced controls. Keep defaults safe, validation explicit, and success state tied to moderation visibility.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Split sections for content and policy settings, with consistent control labels.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A decisive moderation action panel for post-level enforcement.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Present action buttons (hide/lock/archive/delete) with brief consequence hints and optional reason code input. Confirm destructive actions and show resulting state immediately.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Action hierarchy with destructive emphasis, audit sidebar for recent actions.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A streamlined comment moderation view built for fast, accurate decisions.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Keep comment context visible while exposing moderation actions and reason capture. Ensure rapid transitions between comments without losing location in the queue.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Two-pane moderation layout with context on left and actions on right.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A controlled key issuance wizard that balances speed and security clarity.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Guide owners through key class, scopes, permissions, TTL, and comments toggle with inline explanations. Highlight irreversible security implications before final issue.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Step-based or sectioned form with permission chips and scope selectors.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A lifecycle control surface for rotating, revoking, and state-managing keys safely.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Show current key metadata and lifecycle state prominently, then provide guarded transition actions with confirmation and audit trace visibility.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: State timeline component, confirmation modals, and immutable audit snippets.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A searchable key inventory for governance, visibility, and compliance checks.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Render keychains as a sortable/filterable admin list with status, scope, permissions, and expiry columns. Support quick drill-down without overwhelming new operators.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Data-grid emphasis with faceted filters and compact badges.

friendly_ui_description.friendly_summary: A lightweight invite creation page that feels fast and trustworthy.
friendly_ui_description.html_seed_description: Use a small form with immediate feedback on creation and easy copy/share affordances for generated invite IDs. Keep success state prominent and actionable.
friendly_ui_description.style_notes: Compact panel with copy-to-clipboard affordance and success toast.
